#
# File: ticket285.cbs
# Author: Manfred Jeusfeld
# Created: 2011-09-05/M.Jeusfeld (2011-09-05/M.Jeusfeld)
# ------------------------------------------------------
# Certain variables missing in code generated from meta formulas
# Start: CBshell -f ticket285.cbs
#


startServer -u nonpersistent -port 4411 -t veryhigh 


tell "
Domain in Class end

EntityType in Class with
  attribute
    attr: Domain
  rule
    autotype: $ forall a,x,y/VAR C/EntityType D/Domain A/EntityType!attr
                    (x in C) and From(a,x) and To(a,y) and (a in A) and From(A,C) and To(A,D) ==> (y in D) $
end
"

tell "
String in Domain end
"


# this should generate a meta formula for the attribute name,
# however, the generated code is wrong: variable y is lost
# ConceptBase generates
#    $ forall x/Employee a/Employee!name   (From(a,x) and To(a,y)) ==> (y in String) $
# The correct code is
#    $ forall x/Employee y/Proposition a/Employee!name   (From(a,x) and To(a,y)) ==> (y in String) $

tell "
Employee in EntityType with
  attr
    name: String
end
"
